projectDescription: A portable .agent/ folder (memory + skills + protocols) that plugs into Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, OpenCode, and other AI coding harnesses, keeping the agent's knowledge when you switch tools.
keyFeatures: Portable .agent/ folder with memory, skills, and protocols that works across 8 AI harnesses
Four-layer memory system: working, episodic, semantic, and personal
Nightly auto_dream.py staging cycle that clusters patterns into candidate lessons
Host-agent review protocol with graduate.py/reject.py requiring explicit rationale
Progressive skill disclosure — lightweight manifest always in context, full SKILL.md loads on trigger match
Five seed skills: skillforge, memory-manager, git-proxy, debug-investigator, deploy-checklist
Beta FTS5 full-text search over all memory documents
Cross-harness adapter shims for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Hermes, Pi, and standalone Python
publicApiSurface: agentic-stack <harness> — install the portable brain into a project
agentic-stack <harness> --yes — non-interactive install with all defaults
python3 .agent/tools/memory_reflect.py — log an action to episodic memory
python3 .agent/tools/skill_loader.py <skill-name> — load a skill by name
python3 .agent/memory/auto_dream.py — run the nightly staging cycle
python3 .agent/memory/memory_search.py '<query>' — FTS search over memory documents
install.sh <harness> [project-path] — bash installer for macOS/Linux/Git Bash
